headline: BMO Capital Trims ADP Target to $234, Cites Cyclical and Structural Pressures
summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) is included among the 15 Best Cheap Dividend Stocks to Buy. On April 7, BMO Capital analyst Daniel Jester lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) to $234 from $281. It reiterated a Market Perform rating on the shares. The update came as part of a […]
